name: Plan-and-Solve v3 (Fault-Tolerant Plan Parser)
short_description: Forks Plan-and-Solve v2 (t0021) by adding a re-prompt and JSON-mode fallback chain when the planner emits an unparseable numbered list, addressing S-0026-01.

entry_points.name: PlanAndSolveAgentV3
entry_points.description: Plan-and-Solve v3 agent: v2 with a fault-tolerant plan-parsing prefix and the same verbalized-confidence postlude.

entry_points.name: AgentResultV3
entry_points.description: Aggregate result with the v2 fields plus plan_parser_recovery_path and plan_parser_attempts diagnostics.

entry_points.name: _robust_parse_plan
entry_points.description: Standalone planner helper that drives the three-attempt fallback chain (clean / re-prompt / JSON-fallback).

entry_points.name: REPROMPT_PLAN_PROMPT_TEMPLATE
entry_points.description: Template used for the second planner call when the first response fails to parse.

entry_points.name: JSON_PLAN_PROMPT_TEMPLATE
entry_points.description: Template used for the third planner call requesting a JSON object with a 'steps' array.
